title: Trump Seeks to Abolish Iran’s Atomic Stockpile, a Problem He Helped Create
summary_full: President Trump withdrew from the Obama-era nuclear accord in 2018, saying it was the worst deal ever. But Iran responded with an enrichment spree that haunts the negotiations to this day.
summary_public: President Trump withdrew from the Obama-era nuclear accord in 2018, saying it was the worst deal ever. But Iran responded with an enrichment spree that haunts the negotiations to this day.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran responded with an enrichment spree
